title: Paul Mescal and Gracie Abrams at Golden Globes After Party
text: Actor Paul Mescal, 29, and singer girlfriend Gracie Abrams, 26, were photographed departing the Chateau Marmont in Los Angeles on Sunday evening, January 11, following a 2026 Golden Globes celebration event. Mescal had attended the ceremony solo earlier that night as a nominee for Best Supporting Actor in a Motion Picture for his performance in Hamnet. The film itself secured the Best Motion Picture Drama award. His co-star Jessie Buckley also triumphed, winning Best Actress in a Motion Picture Drama. Days before the Golden Globes, Abrams had hosted a high-profile dinner at the same venue to commemorate her ambassadorship with Chanel Fine Jewelry and her involvement in their Coco Crush campaign. The couple's public appearance comes after Mescal offered rare comments about his relationship with Abrams in fall 2025, according to the entertainment outlet.
